posts.text: He was never satisfied with his music. Somewhere, maybe at the bottom of the ocean or beyond the stars, there was an ultimate sound. posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump says “stocks should go up, not down” after today’s jobs report.

“Growth does not mean inflation,” Trump says.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
If the KOSPI drops to levels last seen a few weeks ago, their entire financial system will fail, and they’ll probably need an IMF bailout. 

Governments used to try and avoid bubbles because of the consequences. Now, governments just blow bigger bubbles to bail out the prior ones…
posts.author: hkuppy
